title: graphe #1124
definition:
1) a writing, thing written
 2) the Scripture, used to denote either the book itself, or
    its contents
 3) a certain portion or section of the Holy Scripture
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a writing, thing written
 2) the Scripture, used to denote either the book itself, or
    its contents
 3) a certain portion or section of the Holy Scripture

    NASB:  a writing, scripture:
